assertions.name: has_clear_article_positioning
assertions.description: Output identifies target reader, core promise, and article thesis.

assertions.name: uses_personal_experience_structure
assertions.description: Output structures the article around problem, misjudgment, turning point, method, and larger judgment rather than chronology only.

assertions.name: includes_reusable_reader_value
assertions.description: Output includes at least one checklist, framework, table, template, or step-by-step method.

assertions.name: improves_shareability_without_overclaiming
assertions.description: Output includes title ideas or memorable lines while avoiding exaggerated or unsupported claims.

assertions.name: adapts_to_platform
assertions.description: Output changes tone and structure according to the named platform such as WeChat Official Account or Medium.

assertions.name: asks_targeted_questions_when_material_is_missing
assertions.description: When source material is thin, output asks no more than three useful questions or labels assumptions instead of inventing details.

assertions.name: preserves_author_voice_and_boundaries
assertions.description: Output keeps personal voice, marks unverifiable claims, and avoids fabricated experiences, metrics, quotes, or confidential details.

assertions.name: preserves_author_voice_dna
assertions.description: For rewrites, output first extracts the source author's voice fingerprint and migration rules, then keeps the rewritten article recognizably in the same author's flavor rather than generic AI or public-account prose.

assertions.name: uses_file_backed_workflow_packet
assertions.description: For rewrite or full-package tasks, output is based on a completed workflow packet with intake diagnosis, strategy brief, role reviews, rewrite plan, final article, and a passing workflow check.

assertions.name: preserves_source_images_and_captions
assertions.description: When the source draft contains images or screenshots, output preserves kept image links, visible captions, and includes a placement note explaining where each image belongs in the rewritten article.

assertions.name: reads_like_an_article_not_a_document
assertions.description: Final publish body creates curiosity in the opening, follows a narrative arc, avoids report/tutorial setup language, and ends with one earned judgment instead of repeated summary.
